scripts.name: Parametros executando na procedure
scripts.content:
DECLARE @idSessao INT;

SELECT TOP (1)
    @idSessao = r.session_id,
    r.session_id,
    r.status,
    r.start_time,
    DB_NAME(r.database_id) AS Banco,
    t.text AS ComandoExecutado
FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) t
WHERE t.text LIKE '%PC_NomeProcedure%'
ORDER BY r.start_time DESC;

IF @idSessao IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    SELECT *
    FROM sys.dm_exec_input_buffer(@idSessao, NULL);
END

scripts.name: Ver como esta os indices
scripts.content:
WITH IndexBase AS
(
    SELECT
        s.name AS SchemaName,
        o.name AS ObjectName,
        o.type_desc AS ObjectType,
        i.name AS IndexName,
        i.object_id,
        i.index_id,
        i.type_desc AS IndexType,
        p.data_compression_desc,
        i.fill_factor,
        i.is_padded,
        i.allow_row_locks,
        i.allow_page_locks,
        SUM(a.total_pages) * 8.0 / 1024 AS TotalMB,
        SUM(p.rows) AS TotalRows
    FROM sys.indexes i
    JOIN sys.objects o
        ON o.object_id = i.object_id
    JOIN sys.schemas s
        ON s.schema_id = o.schema_id
    JOIN sys.partitions p
        ON p.object_id = i.object_id
       AND p.index_id = i.index_id
    JOIN sys.allocation_units a
        ON a.container_id = p.partition_id
    WHERE
        o.is_ms_shipped = 0
        AND i.index_id > 0
    GROUP BY
        s.name,
        o.name,
        o.type_desc,
        i.name,
        i.object_id,
        i.index_id,
        i.type_desc,
        p.data_compression_desc,
        i.fill_factor,
        i.is_padded,
        i.allow_row_locks,
        i.allow_page_locks
),
UsageBase AS
(
    SELECT
        object_id,
        index_id,
        user_seeks,
        user_scans,
        user_lookups,
        user_updates
    FROM sys.dm_db_index_usage_stats
    WHERE database_id = DB_ID()
)
SELECT
    ib.SchemaName,
    ib.ObjectName,
    ib.ObjectType,
    ib.IndexName,
    ib.IndexType,
    ib.TotalMB,
    ib.TotalRows,
    ib.data_compression_desc AS CompressaoAtual,
    ib.fill_factor,
    ib.is_padded,
    ib.allow_row_locks,
    ib.allow_page_locks,

    ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) AS UserSeeks,
    ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) AS UserScans,
    ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0) AS UserLookups,
    ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) AS UserUpdates,

    CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 
             (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) * 2
             AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 1000
            THEN 'WRITE_HEAVY'
        WHEN (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) >= 
             ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) * 2
            THEN 'READ_HEAVY'
        ELSE 'MISTO'
    END AS PerfilUso,

    CASE
        WHEN ib.TotalMB >= 1024
             AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 
                 (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) * 2
             AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 1000
            THEN 'ROW'
        WHEN ib.TotalMB >= 1024
             AND (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) >= 
                 ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) * 2
            THEN 'PAGE'
        WHEN ib.TotalMB < 128
            THEN 'NONE/ROW'
        ELSE 'ROW'
    END AS CompressaoSugeridaDiagnostico,

    CASE
        WHEN ib.data_compression_desc <> 
            CASE
                WHEN ib.TotalMB >= 1024
                     AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 
                         (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) * 2
                     AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 1000
                    THEN 'ROW'
                WHEN ib.TotalMB >= 1024
                     AND (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) >= 
                         ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) * 2
                    THEN 'PAGE'
                WHEN ib.TotalMB < 128
                    THEN ib.data_compression_desc
                ELSE 'ROW'
            END
            THEN 'DIVERGENTE'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS StatusDiagnostico
FROM IndexBase ib
LEFT JOIN UsageBase ub
    ON ub.object_id = ib.object_id
   AND ub.index_id = ib.index_id
ORDER BY
    ib.TotalMB DESC;

scripts.name: Transações abertas há mais tempo
scripts.content:
SELECT 
    s.session_id,
    s.login_name,
    s.host_name,
    s.program_name,
    t.transaction_begin_time,
    DATEDIFF(MINUTE, t.transaction_begin_time, GETDATE()) AS minutos_aberta,
    s.status,
    r.command,
    r.wait_type,
    SUBSTRING(st.text, (r.statement_start_offset/2)+1, 
        ((CASE r.statement_end_offset WHEN -1 THEN DATALENGTH(st.text) 
          ELSE r.statement_end_offset END - r.statement_start_offset)/2)+1) AS sql_atual
FROM sys.dm_tran_active_transactions t
JOIN sys.dm_tran_session_transactions ts ON t.transaction_id = ts.transaction_id
JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions s ON ts.session_id = s.session_id
LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON s.session_id = r.session_id
OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) st
ORDER BY t.transaction_begin_time ASC;


SELECT
    s.session_id                                    AS SPID,
    s.login_name,
    s.host_name,
    s.program_name,
    DB_NAME(dt.database_id)                         AS Banco,
    at.name                                         AS TransactionName,
    at.transaction_begin_time                       AS InicioTransacao,
    DATEDIFF(MINUTE, at.transaction_begin_time, GETDATE()) AS MinutosAberta,
    s.status,
    r.status                                        AS RequestStatus,
    r.command,
    r.wait_type,
    r.blocking_session_id,
    st.text                                         AS QueryExecutando
FROM sys.dm_tran_active_transactions at
INNER JOIN sys.dm_tran_session_transactions stt
    ON at.transaction_id = stt.transaction_id
INNER JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions s
    ON stt.session_id = s.session_id
LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r
    ON s.session_id = r.session_id
LEFT JOIN sys.dm_tran_database_transactions dt
    ON at.transaction_id = dt.transaction_id
OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) st
WHERE s.session_id <> @@SPID
ORDER BY at.transaction_begin_time ASC;

scripts.name: Verificar como estão os indices
scripts.content:
Ver como esta os indices

WITH IndexBase AS
(
    SELECT
        s.name AS SchemaName,
        o.name AS ObjectName,
        o.type_desc AS ObjectType,
        i.name AS IndexName,
        i.object_id,
        i.index_id,
        i.type_desc AS IndexType,
        p.data_compression_desc,
        i.fill_factor,
        i.is_padded,
        i.allow_row_locks,
        i.allow_page_locks,
        SUM(a.total_pages) * 8.0 / 1024 AS TotalMB,
        SUM(p.rows) AS TotalRows
    FROM sys.indexes i
    JOIN sys.objects o
        ON o.object_id = i.object_id
    JOIN sys.schemas s
        ON s.schema_id = o.schema_id
    JOIN sys.partitions p
        ON p.object_id = i.object_id
       AND p.index_id = i.index_id
    JOIN sys.allocation_units a
        ON a.container_id = p.partition_id
    WHERE
        o.is_ms_shipped = 0
        AND i.index_id > 0
    GROUP BY
        s.name,
        o.name,
        o.type_desc,
        i.name,
        i.object_id,
        i.index_id,
        i.type_desc,
        p.data_compression_desc,
        i.fill_factor,
        i.is_padded,
        i.allow_row_locks,
        i.allow_page_locks
),
UsageBase AS
(
    SELECT
        object_id,
        index_id,
        user_seeks,
        user_scans,
        user_lookups,
        user_updates
    FROM sys.dm_db_index_usage_stats
    WHERE database_id = DB_ID()
)
SELECT
    ib.SchemaName,
    ib.ObjectName,
    ib.ObjectType,
    ib.IndexName,
    ib.IndexType,
    ib.TotalMB,
    ib.TotalRows,
    ib.data_compression_desc AS CompressaoAtual,
    ib.fill_factor,
    ib.is_padded,
    ib.allow_row_locks,
    ib.allow_page_locks,

    ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) AS UserSeeks,
    ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) AS UserScans,
    ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0) AS UserLookups,
    ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) AS UserUpdates,

    CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 
             (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) * 2
             AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 1000
            THEN 'WRITE_HEAVY'
        WHEN (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) >= 
             ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) * 2
            THEN 'READ_HEAVY'
        ELSE 'MISTO'
    END AS PerfilUso,

    CASE
        WHEN ib.TotalMB >= 1024
             AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 
                 (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) * 2
             AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 1000
            THEN 'ROW'
        WHEN ib.TotalMB >= 1024
             AND (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) >= 
                 ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) * 2
            THEN 'PAGE'
        WHEN ib.TotalMB < 128
            THEN 'NONE/ROW'
        ELSE 'ROW'
    END AS CompressaoSugeridaDiagnostico,

    CASE
        WHEN ib.data_compression_desc <> 
            CASE
                WHEN ib.TotalMB >= 1024
                     AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 
                         (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) * 2
                     AND ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) >= 1000
                    THEN 'ROW'
                WHEN ib.TotalMB >= 1024
                     AND (ISNULL(ub.user_seeks, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_scans, 0) + ISNULL(ub.user_lookups, 0)) >= 
                         ISNULL(ub.user_updates, 0) * 2
                    THEN 'PAGE'
                WHEN ib.TotalMB < 128
                    THEN ib.data_compression_desc
                ELSE 'ROW'
            END
            THEN 'DIVERGENTE'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS StatusDiagnostico
FROM IndexBase ib
LEFT JOIN UsageBase ub
    ON ub.object_id = ib.object_id
   AND ub.index_id = ib.index_id
ORDER BY
    ib.TotalMB DESC;

scripts.name: Script para verificar o que está rodando em um processo específico
scripts.content:
DECLARE @SPID INT = 208  -- <<<< ALTERE AQUI O ID DO PROCESSO

-- Informações básicas do processo
SELECT 
    s.session_id AS [SPID],
    s.login_name AS [Login],
    s.host_name AS [Host],
    s.program_name AS [Programa],
    s.status AS [Status],
    s.cpu_time AS [Tempo_CPU_ms],
    s.memory_usage AS [Uso_Memoria_8KB],
    s.total_elapsed_time AS [Tempo_Decorrido_ms],
    s.reads AS [Leituras],
    s.writes AS [Escritas],
    s.logical_reads AS [Leituras_Logicas],
    DB_NAME(r.database_id) AS [Database],
    r.command AS [Comando],
    r.wait_type AS [Tipo_Espera],
    r.wait_time AS [Tempo_Espera_ms],
    r.blocking_session_id AS [Bloqueado_Por],
    r.open_transaction_count AS [Transacoes_Abertas],
    r.percent_complete AS [Percentual_Completo]
FROM sys.dm_exec_sessions s
LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON s.session_id = r.session_id
WHERE s.session_id = @SPID;

-- Query que está sendo executada
SELECT 
    s.session_id AS [SPID],
    SUBSTRING(qt.text, 
        (r.statement_start_offset/2) + 1,
        ((CASE r.statement_end_offset
            WHEN -1 THEN DATALENGTH(qt.text)
            ELSE r.statement_end_offset
        END - r.statement_start_offset)/2) + 1
    ) AS [Query_Atual],
    qt.text AS [Query_Completa],
    qp.query_plan AS [Plano_Execucao]
FROM sys.dm_exec_sessions s
INNER JOIN sys.dm_exec_requests r ON s.session_id = r.session_id
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) qt
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_query_plan(r.plan_handle) qp
WHERE s.session_id = @SPID;

-- Locks do processo
SELECT 
    resource_type AS [Tipo_Recurso],
    resource_database_id AS [Database_ID],
    DB_NAME(resource_database_id) AS [Database],
    resource_description AS [Descricao],
    request_mode AS [Modo_Lock],
    request_status AS [Status_Lock]
FROM sys.dm_tran_locks
WHERE request_session_id = @SPID;

-- Últimas queries executadas pela sessão
SELECT TOP 5
    s.session_id AS [SPID],
    s.login_name AS [Login],
    st.text AS [Query],
    qs.execution_count AS [Execucoes],
    qs.total_elapsed_time/1000000 AS [Tempo_Total_seg],
    qs.last_execution_time AS [Ultima_Execucao]
FROM sys.dm_exec_sessions s
INNER JOIN sys.dm_exec_connections c ON s.session_id = c.session_id
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(c.most_recent_sql_handle) st
LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_query_stats qs ON qs.sql_handle = c.most_recent_sql_handle
WHERE s.session_id = @SPID
ORDER BY qs.last_execution_time DESC;

scripts.name: HD - Disco - Latencia
scripts.content:
SELECT
    DB_NAME(fs.database_id) AS [Database Name],
    mf.physical_name,
    fs.io_stall_read_ms,
    fs.num_of_reads,
    -- Média de latência de leitura em ms
    CASE WHEN fs.num_of_reads = 0 THEN 0
         ELSE fs.io_stall_read_ms / fs.num_of_reads END AS [Avg Read Stall (ms)],
    fs.io_stall_write_ms,
    fs.num_of_writes,
    -- Média de latência de escrita em ms
    CASE WHEN fs.num_of_writes = 0 THEN 0
         ELSE fs.io_stall_write_ms / fs.num_of_writes END AS [Avg Write Stall (ms)],
    fs.io_stall_read_ms + fs.io_stall_write_ms AS [Total IO Stall (ms)],
    fs.num_of_reads + fs.num_of_writes AS [Total IOs]
FROM
    sys.dm_io_virtual_file_stats(NULL, NULL) AS fs
INNER JOIN
    sys.master_files AS mf ON fs.database_id = mf.database_id AND fs.file_id = mf.file_id
ORDER BY
    [Total IO Stall (ms)] DESC;

scripts.name: DIMENSIONAMENTO CORRETO DO TEMPDB
scripts.content:
-- =====================================================
-- SCRIPT PARA DIMENSIONAMENTO CORRETO DO TEMPDB
-- Coleta informações da máquina e ambiente SQL Server
-- =====================================================

PRINT '========================================='
PRINT 'ANÁLISE COMPLETA PARA DIMENSIONAMENTO TEMPDB';
PRINT '========================================='
PRINT '';

-- =====================================================
-- 1. INFORMAÇÕES DE HARDWARE
-- =====================================================
PRINT '1. INFORMAÇÕES DE HARDWARE:';
PRINT '----------------------------';

SELECT 
    'CPU_CORES' as Categoria,
    cpu_count as Valor,
    CASE 
        WHEN cpu_count <= 4 THEN 'Recomendado: ' + CAST(cpu_count as varchar) + ' arquivos tempdb'
        WHEN cpu_count <= 8 THEN 'Recomendado: ' + CAST(cpu_count as varchar) + ' arquivos tempdb'
        ELSE 'Recomendado: 8 arquivos tempdb (máximo)'
    END as Recomendacao
FROM sys.dm_os_sys_info
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'CPU_LOGICAS' as Categoria,
    cpu_count as Valor,
    'Total de processadores lógicos' as Recomendacao
FROM sys.dm_os_sys_info
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'MEMORIA_TOTAL_MB' as Categoria,
    physical_memory_kb / 1024 as Valor,
    CASE 
        WHEN physical_memory_kb / 1024 < 4096 THEN 'RAM baixa - TempDB inicial: 1GB por arquivo'
        WHEN physical_memory_kb / 1024 < 16384 THEN 'RAM média - TempDB inicial: 2-4GB por arquivo'
        ELSE 'RAM alta - TempDB inicial: 4-8GB por arquivo'
    END as Recomendacao
FROM sys.dm_os_sys_info;

PRINT ''

-- =====================================================
-- 2. CONFIGURAÇÃO ATUAL DO TEMPDB
-- =====================================================
PRINT '2. CONFIGURAÇÃO ATUAL DO TEMPDB:';
PRINT '--------------------------------';

SELECT 
    f.name AS Nome_Arquivo,
    f.physical_name AS Caminho_Fisico,
    CAST(f.size * 8.0 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) AS Tamanho_Atual_MB,
    CASE 
        WHEN f.max_size = -1 THEN 'Ilimitado'
        WHEN f.max_size = 268435456 THEN 'Padrão (2TB)'
        ELSE CAST(f.max_size * 8.0 / 1024 as VARCHAR) + ' MB'
    END AS Tamanho_Maximo,
    CASE 
        WHEN f.is_percent_growth = 1 THEN CAST(f.growth as VARCHAR) + '%'
        ELSE CAST(f.growth * 8.0 / 1024 as VARCHAR) + ' MB'
    END AS Crescimento,
    CASE 
        WHEN f.is_percent_growth = 1 THEN ' PERCENTUAL (RUIM)'
        ELSE ' FIXO (BOM)'
    END AS Status_Crescimento
FROM sys.master_files f
WHERE f.database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')
ORDER BY f.file_id;

-- Total atual do TempDB
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as Total_Arquivos_Atuais,
    CAST(SUM(size * 8.0 / 1024) as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Total_MB_Atual,
    CAST(SUM(size * 8.0 / 1024 / 1024) as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Total_GB_Atual
FROM sys.master_files 
WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb');

PRINT '';

-- =====================================================
-- 3. USO ATUAL DO TEMPDB
-- =====================================================
PRINT '3. USO ATUAL DO TEMPDB:';
PRINT '----------------------';

SELECT 
    'ESPACO_TOTAL_MB' as Metrica,
    CAST(SUM(size) * 8.0 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Valor
FROM sys.master_files 
WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'ESPACO_USADO_MB' as Metrica,
    CAST(SUM(user_object_reserved_page_count + internal_object_reserved_page_count) * 8.0 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Valor
FROM sys.dm_db_file_space_usage 
WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'ESPACO_LIVRE_MB' as Metrica,
    CAST(SUM(unallocated_extent_page_count) * 8.0 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Valor
FROM sys.dm_db_file_space_usage 
WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb');

-- Detalhamento por tipo de uso
SELECT 
    'Objetos_Usuario' as Tipo_Uso,
    CAST(SUM(user_object_reserved_page_count) * 8.0 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as MB_Usado,
    CAST((SUM(user_object_reserved_page_count) * 100.0 / SUM(user_object_reserved_page_count + internal_object_reserved_page_count + unallocated_extent_page_count)) as DECIMAL(5,2)) as Percentual
FROM sys.dm_db_file_space_usage 
WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Objetos_Internos' as Tipo_Uso,
    CAST(SUM(internal_object_reserved_page_count) * 8.0 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as MB_Usado,
    CAST((SUM(internal_object_reserved_page_count) * 100.0 / SUM(user_object_reserved_page_count + internal_object_reserved_page_count + unallocated_extent_page_count)) as DECIMAL(5,2)) as Percentual
FROM sys.dm_db_file_space_usage 
WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Espaco_Livre' as Tipo_Uso,
    CAST(SUM(unallocated_extent_page_count) * 8.0 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as MB_Usado,
    CAST((SUM(unallocated_extent_page_count) * 100.0 / SUM(user_object_reserved_page_count + internal_object_reserved_page_count + unallocated_extent_page_count)) as DECIMAL(5,2)) as Percentual
FROM sys.dm_db_file_space_usage 
WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb');

PRINT ''

-- =====================================================
-- 4. INFORMAÇÕES DE DISCO
-- =====================================================
PRINT '4. INFORMAÇÕES DE DISCO:';
PRINT '-----------------------';

-- Verificar espaço nos drives onde estão os arquivos tempdb
WITH DiskInfo AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        LEFT(f.physical_name, 3) as Drive,
        f.physical_name
    FROM sys.master_files f
    WHERE f.database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')
)
SELECT 
    vs.volume_mount_point as Drive,
    CAST(vs.total_bytes / 1024.0 / 1024 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Total_GB,
    CAST(vs.available_bytes / 1024.0 / 1024 / 1024 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Disponivel_GB,
    CAST(((vs.total_bytes - vs.available_bytes) * 100.0 / vs.total_bytes) as DECIMAL(5,2)) as Uso_Percentual,
    CASE 
        WHEN vs.available_bytes / 1024.0 / 1024 / 1024 > 50 THEN ' Espaço suficiente'
        WHEN vs.available_bytes / 1024.0 / 1024 / 1024 > 20 THEN ' Atenção ao espaço'
        ELSE ' Pouco espaço disponível'
    END as Status_Espaco
FROM sys.master_files mf
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_os_volume_stats(mf.database_id, mf.file_id) vs
WHERE mf.database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')
GROUP BY vs.volume_mount_point, vs.total_bytes, vs.available_bytes;

PRINT ''

-- =====================================================
-- 5. HISTÓRICO DE PERFORMANCE (WAIT STATS)
-- =====================================================
PRINT '5. WAIT STATS RELACIONADOS AO TEMPDB:';
PRINT '------------------------------------';

SELECT 
    wait_type as Tipo_Espera,
    waiting_tasks_count as Tarefas_Esperando,
    CAST(wait_time_ms / 1000.0 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Tempo_Espera_Seg,
    CAST(signal_wait_time_ms / 1000.0 as DECIMAL(10,2)) as Tempo_Sinal_Seg,
    CASE 
        WHEN wait_time_ms > 10000 THEN ' Problema de performance'
        WHEN wait_time_ms > 5000 THEN ' Monitorar'
        ELSE ' Normal'
    END as Status
FROM sys.dm_os_wait_stats 
WHERE wait_type IN (
    'TEMPDB',
    'PAGELATCH_UP',
    'PAGELATCH_SH',
    'PAGELATCH_EX',
    'PAGEIOLATCH_UP',
    'PAGEIOLATCH_SH',
    'PAGEIOLATCH_EX'
)
AND wait_time_ms > 0
ORDER BY wait_time_ms DESC;

PRINT '';

-- =====================================================
-- 6. RECOMENDAÇÕES PERSONALIZADAS
-- =====================================================
PRINT '6. RECOMENDAÇÕES PERSONALIZADAS:';
PRINT '-------------------------------';

DECLARE @cpu_count int, @memory_gb decimal(10,2), @current_files int, @current_size_gb decimal(10,2)

SELECT @cpu_count = cpu_count FROM sys.dm_os_sys_info
SELECT @memory_gb = physical_memory_kb / 1024.0 / 1024 FROM sys.dm_os_sys_info
SELECT @current_files = COUNT(*) FROM sys.master_files WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')
SELECT @current_size_gb = SUM(size * 8.0 / 1024 / 1024) FROM sys.master_files WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb')

DECLARE @recommended_files int, @recommended_size_per_file_gb decimal(10,2)

-- Calcular número recomendado de arquivos
SET @recommended_files = CASE 
    WHEN @cpu_count <= 4 THEN @cpu_count
    WHEN @cpu_count <= 8 THEN @cpu_count  
    ELSE 8 
END

-- Calcular tamanho recomendado por arquivo
SET @recommended_size_per_file_gb = CASE
    WHEN @memory_gb < 4 THEN 1
    WHEN @memory_gb < 16 THEN CEILING(@current_size_gb / @recommended_files)
    ELSE CEILING((@current_size_gb * 1.2) / @recommended_files)  -- 20% a mais
END

-- Ajuste mínimo de 2GB por arquivo para ambientes com mais memória
IF @memory_gb >= 16 AND @recommended_size_per_file_gb < 2
    SET @recommended_size_per_file_gb = 2

SELECT 
    'Configuração Atual' as Aspecto,
    CAST(@current_files as varchar) + ' arquivos, ' + 
    CAST(@current_size_gb as varchar) + ' GB total' as Valor_Atual,
    'N/A' as Valor_Recomendado
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Configuração Recomendada' as Aspecto,
    'N/A' as Valor_Atual,
    CAST(@recommended_files as varchar) + ' arquivos, ' + 
    CAST(@recommended_files * @recommended_size_per_file_gb as varchar) + ' GB total (' +
    CAST(@recommended_size_per_file_gb as varchar) + ' GB por arquivo)' as Valor_Recomendado
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Crescimento Recomendado' as Aspecto,
    'Verificar configuração atual acima' as Valor_Atual,
    CASE 
        WHEN @recommended_size_per_file_gb <= 2 THEN '256 MB fixo'
        WHEN @recommended_size_per_file_gb <= 4 THEN '512 MB fixo'
        ELSE '1024 MB fixo'
    END as Valor_Recomendado;

PRINT '';

-- =====================================================
-- 7. SCRIPT DE IMPLEMENTAÇÃO GERADO AUTOMATICAMENTE
-- =====================================================
PRINT '7. SCRIPT DE IMPLEMENTAÇÃO:';
PRINT '--------------------------';
PRINT '-- Execute este script após fazer backup completo';
PRINT '-- ATENÇÃO: Requer reinicialização do SQL Server';
PRINT '';

DECLARE @sql_modify NVARCHAR(MAX) = ''
DECLARE @sql_remove NVARCHAR(MAX) = ''
DECLARE @growth_mb int = CASE 
    WHEN @recommended_size_per_file_gb <= 2 THEN 256
    WHEN @recommended_size_per_file_gb <= 4 THEN 512
    ELSE 1024
END

-- Script para modificar arquivos existentes
SELECT @sql_modify = @sql_modify + 
'ALTER DATABASE tempdb MODIFY FILE (NAME = ''' + name + ''', SIZE = ' + 
CAST(@recommended_size_per_file_gb * 1024 as varchar) + 'MB, FILEGROWTH = ' + 
CAST(@growth_mb as varchar) + 'MB);' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10)
FROM sys.master_files 
WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb') 
AND file_id <= @recommended_files

-- Script para remover arquivos excessivos
IF @current_files > @recommended_files
BEGIN
    SELECT @sql_remove = @sql_remove + 
    '-- ALTER DATABASE tempdb REMOVE FILE ' + name + '; -- Execute APÓS reinicializar' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10)
    FROM sys.master_files 
    WHERE database_id = DB_ID('tempdb') 
    AND file_id > @recommended_files
END

-- Script para adicionar arquivos se necessário
IF @current_files < @recommended_files
BEGIN
    DECLARE @i int = @current_files + 1
    WHILE @i <= @recommended_files
    BEGIN
        SET @sql_modify = @sql_modify + 
        'ALTER DATABASE tempdb ADD FILE (NAME = ''tempdev' + CAST(@i as varchar) + 
        ''', FILENAME = ''C:\TempDB\tempdev' + CAST(@i as varchar) + '.ndf'', SIZE = ' +
        CAST(@recommended_size_per_file_gb * 1024 as varchar) + 'MB, FILEGROWTH = ' + 
        CAST(@growth_mb as varchar) + 'MB);' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10)
        
        SET @i = @i + 1
    END
END

PRINT 'USE master;'
PRINT 'GO'
PRINT '';
PRINT @sql_modify;

IF LEN(@sql_remove) > 0
BEGIN
    PRINT ''
    PRINT '-- SCRIPTS PARA EXECUTAR APÓS REINICIALIZAR O SQL SERVER:'
    PRINT @sql_remove
END

PRINT ''
PRINT '========================================='
PRINT 'ANÁLISE CONCLUÍDA!'
PRINT 'Revise as recomendações antes de aplicar'
PRINT '========================================='

scripts.name: Verificar banco parado
scripts.content:
SELECT 
    DER.session_id AS [IdSessao],
    COALESCE(DB_NAME(s.database_id), 'N/A') AS [NomeBanco],
    DER.command AS [TipoComando],
    CASE 
        WHEN DER.status = 'background' THEN 'Recuperação em andamento'
        ELSE DER.status 
    END AS [Status],
	DER.percent_complete AS [Progresso_%],
    -- Formato hh:mi:ss:mmm
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), DATEADD(ms, DER.estimated_completion_time, 0), 114) AS [TempoRestante_Estimado],
    DATEADD(ms, DER.estimated_completion_time, GETDATE()) AS [DataHora_Termino_Estimado],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), DATEADD(ms, DER.total_elapsed_time, 0), 114) AS [TempoDecorrido], 
    DER.start_time AS [DataHora_Inicio],
    DER.blocking_session_id AS [Sessao_Bloqueadora],
    DER.wait_type AS [Tipo_Espera],
    DER.wait_time AS [Tempo_Espera_ms],
    DER.last_wait_type AS [Ultimo_Tipo_Espera],
    DER.wait_resource AS [Recurso_Espera],
    DER.cpu_time AS [Tempo_CPU_ms],

    -- Conversões para MB (páginas * 8KB => MB = páginas / 128)
    CAST(DER.logical_reads / 128.0 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS [Leitura_Logica_MB],
    CAST(DER.reads         / 128.0 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS [Leitura_Fisica_MB],
    CAST(DER.writes        / 128.0 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS [Gravacao_MB],

    SUBSTRING(
        REPLACE(REPLACE(
            REPLACE(SUBSTRING(
                qt.text, 
                (DER.statement_start_offset/2)+1, 
                (
                    (CASE DER.statement_end_offset
                        WHEN -1 THEN DATALENGTH(qt.text)
                        ELSE DER.statement_end_offset
                    END - DER.statement_start_offset)/2
                ) + 1
            ), CHAR(10), ' '), CHAR(13), ' '), '  ', ' '), 
        1, 1000) AS [Comando_Atual]
FROM 
    sys.dm_exec_requests AS DER
LEFT JOIN 
    sys.dm_exec_sessions AS s 
        ON DER.session_id = s.session_id
OUTER APPLY 
    sys.dm_exec_sql_text(DER.sql_handle) AS qt
WHERE 
    DER.command IN ('DB STARTUP', 'RECOVERY', 'ROLLBACK', 'BACKUP', 'RESTORE', 'DBCC')
    AND DER.percent_complete > 0
ORDER BY 
    DER.start_time DESC;

scripts.name: TOP 20 indices mais fragmentados do banco
scripts.content:
SELECT TOP 20
    DB_NAME() AS database_name,
    OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(ips.object_id) AS schema_name,
    OBJECT_NAME(ips.object_id) AS table_name,
    i.name AS index_name,
    i.type_desc AS index_type,
    ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent,
    ips.fragment_count,
    ips.page_count,
    ips.record_count,
    ips.avg_page_space_used_in_percent,
    CASE 
        WHEN ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent <= 5 THEN 'Bom'
        WHEN ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent <= 30 THEN 'Reorganizar'
        ELSE 'Reconstruir'
    END AS recomendacao,
    -- SCRIPT AUTOMATIZADO:
    CASE 
        WHEN ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent <= 5 THEN 
            '-- Índice OK (Fragmentação: ' + CAST(ROUND(ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent, 2) AS VARCHAR(10)) + '%)'
        WHEN ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent <= 30 THEN 
            'ALTER INDEX [' + i.name + '] ON [' + OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(ips.object_id) + '].[' + OBJECT_NAME(ips.object_id) + '] REORGANIZE;'
        ELSE 
            'ALTER INDEX [' + i.name + '] ON [' + OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(ips.object_id) + '].[' + OBJECT_NAME(ips.object_id) + '] REBUILD;'
    END AS script_execucao
FROM sys.dm_db_index_physical_stats(DB_ID(), NULL, NULL, NULL, 'DETAILED') ips
JOIN sys.indexes i ON ips.object_id = i.object_id AND ips.index_id = i.index_id
JOIN sys.objects o ON ips.object_id = o.object_id
WHERE ips.index_id > 0 
  AND ips.page_count > 10 
  AND o.type = 'U' -- Apenas tabelas de usuário
  AND ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent > 0
ORDER BY ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent DESC;

scripts.name: TOP 10 Scrip rodando uso CPU
scripts.content:
SELECT TOP 10
    r.session_id,
    s.login_name,
    r.cpu_time AS CPU_ms,
    r.total_elapsed_time AS Tempo_Total_ms,
    r.logical_reads,
    r.reads,
    r.writes,
    DB_NAME(r.database_id) AS Banco,
    SUBSTRING(t.text,
        (r.statement_start_offset / 2) + 1,
        ((CASE r.statement_end_offset
            WHEN -1 THEN DATALENGTH(t.text)
            ELSE r.statement_end_offset
        END - r.statement_start_offset) / 2) + 1) AS Query
FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r
JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions s ON r.session_id = s.session_id
CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(r.sql_handle) t
ORDER BY r.cpu_time DESC;

scripts.name: Analisar bloqueando
scripts.content:
SELECT 
    -- Informações do processo bloqueante
    bloqueante.session_id AS [SessaoBloqueante],
    bloqueante_sql.text AS [ComandoBloqueandoSQL],
    
    -- Informações do processo aguardando
    aguardando.session_id AS [SessaoAguardando],
    aguardando.blocking_session_id AS [BloqueadoPor],
    aguardando_sql.text AS [ComandoAguardandoSQL],
    
    -- Informações da sessão
    sess.host_name AS [Computador],
    sess.login_name AS [Login],
    sess.program_name AS [Aplicativo],
    
    -- Status e timing
    aguardando.status AS [Status],
    aguardando.command AS [TipoComando],
    aguardando.wait_type AS [TipoEspera],
    aguardando.wait_time AS [TempoEspera_ms],
    aguardando.last_wait_type AS [UltimoTipoEspera],
    
    -- Informações adicionais úteis
    aguardando.cpu_time AS [TempoCPU_ms],
    aguardando.logical_reads AS [LeiturasLogicas],
    aguardando.reads AS [Leituras],
    aguardando.writes AS [Escritas],
    
    -- Database context
    DB_NAME(aguardando.database_id) AS [BaseDados],
    
    -- Timing information
    aguardando.start_time AS [HoraInicio],
    sess.last_request_start_time AS [UltimaRequisicao]

FROM sys.dm_exec_requests aguardando
    -- Join com sessões para obter informações do cliente
    INNER JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions sess ON aguardando.session_id = sess.session_id
    
    -- Join com sessões bloqueantes
    LEFT JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions bloqueante ON aguardando.blocking_session_id = bloqueante.session_id
    
    -- Obter texto SQL do comando aguardando
    CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(aguardando.sql_handle) AS aguardando_sql
    
    -- Obter texto SQL do comando bloqueante (se existir)
    OUTER APPLY (
        SELECT req.sql_handle
        FROM sys.dm_exec_requests req 
        WHERE req.session_id = aguardando.blocking_session_id
    ) AS bloqueante_handle
    OUTER APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(bloqueante_handle.sql_handle) AS bloqueante_sql

WHERE 
    aguardando.blocking_session_id > 0  -- Apenas processos bloqueados
    AND aguardando.session_id <> @@SPID  -- Excluir nossa própria sessão

ORDER BY 
    aguardando.blocking_session_id,
aguardando.wait_time DESC;

scripts.name: Sugestao desfrag índice por tabela
scripts.content:
SELECT 
    OBJECT_NAME(ips.object_id) AS table_name,
    i.name AS index_name,
    i.type_desc AS index_type,
    ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent,
    ips.fragment_count,
    ips.page_count,
    ips.record_count,
    ips.avg_page_space_used_in_percent,
    CASE 
        WHEN ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent <= 5 THEN 'Bom'
        WHEN ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent <= 30 THEN 'Reorganizar'
        ELSE 'Reconstruir'
    END AS recomendacao,
    -- SCRIPT AUTOMATIZADO:
    CASE 
        WHEN ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent <= 5 THEN 
            '-- Índice OK'
        WHEN ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent <= 30 THEN 
            'ALTER INDEX [' + i.name + '] ON ' + OBJECT_NAME(ips.object_id) + ' REORGANIZE;'
        ELSE 
            'ALTER INDEX [' + i.name + '] ON '+OBJECT_NAME(ips.object_id) +' REBUILD;'
    END AS script_execucao
FROM sys.dm_db_index_physical_stats(DB_ID(), OBJECT_ID('FIN_ALancamentoFinanceiro'), NULL, NULL, 'DETAILED') ips
JOIN sys.indexes i ON ips.object_id = i.object_id AND ips.index_id = i.index_id
WHERE ips.index_id > 0 
  AND ips.page_count > 10 
ORDER BY ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent DESC
